name: causal-halting
description: A Codex skill, prompt guard, checker, trace analyzer, and repair workflow for detecting and refactoring prediction-feedback loops.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and refactor prediction-feedback loops in agent systems.
interface.longDescription: Causal Halting packages a Codex skill, low-cost UserPromptSubmit context guard, CHC-0 reference notes, explicit graph checker, design analyzer, deterministic trace analyzer, and repair workflow for separating structural prediction-feedback cycles from ordinary semantic undecidability.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this agent loop with CHC-0.
Check this halting-style graph for feedback.
Analyze this agent trace for current-run prediction feedback.
Repair this causal_paradox into a safe orchestrator boundary.
